title: Is there any method to easily get the raw Value of the cell (RAW value is the one that is displayed in the cell)
author: titanabrian
body:
## 💬 Questions and Help


Is there any method to easily get the raw Value of the cell (RAW value is the one that is displayed in the cell)?

I understand there are multiples value type, instead of I am checking the value one by one is there any built in method to retrieve the value like .getRawValue() . Thanks
### How to make a question?
